impact: This advances the PP&D plan by turning source freshness classifier results into a commit-safe report that summarizes changed requirements, link changes, affected permit-process fixtures, and citation references without live crawling or private artifacts.
summary: Add a fixture-only source freshness change report renderer with deterministic fixture coverage.
target_task: Task checkbox-62: Add the fixture-only source freshness change report renderer only after the classifier task passes, summarizing changed requirements, new or removed links, affected permit-process fixtures, and citation references.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
